---
title: "Joel Ardiaca"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/Foto_corporativa_rodona.png
---

*PhD student in Political Science*

*Data Analyst at Centre d'Estudis d'Opinió*

<div style="margin-top: 15px; display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; justify-content: center">

<a href="https://github.com/joelardiaca" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/github_logo.svg" alt="GitHub" style="height: 22px;">
</a>

<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/joelardiaca.bsky.social" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/bluesky.svg" alt="Bluesky" style="height: 22px;">
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/joel-ardiaca-arnau-516791174/" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/linkedin_logo.svg" alt="Linkedin" style="height: 22px;">
</a>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0004-4937-8941" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/ORCID-iD_icon.svg" alt="ORCID" style="height: 22px;">
</a>

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=GXeei6sAAAAJ&hl=ca" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/google_scholar.svg" alt="Google_Scholar" style="height: 22px;">
</a>

</div>
